# Seismic Attributes

**Summary**: The use of various seismic signal characteristics to identify geological features.

---

## How It Appears in the Thesis Collection

- [[1997-al-marhoun|Al-Marhoun, 1997]] utilized seismic attributes for quantitative and qualitative interpretation.

## Key Subtopics

- [[1997-al-marhoun|Al-Marhoun, 1997]] ['amplitude analysis', 'spectral analysis', 'multi-attribute integration']

## Methods and Approaches Used

- [[1997-al-marhoun|Al-Marhoun, 1997]] ['seismic-attribute-analysis']

## Key Findings Across Sources

- Combining multiple attributes (e.g., amplitude, frequency) reduced the sum of squared residuals in property prediction. ([[1997-al-marhoun|Al-Marhoun, 1997, p. 90]])

## Competing Approaches and Debates

- [[1997-al-marhoun|Al-Marhoun, 1997]] Selecting the right combination of attributes; filtering out noise.
